title: publisher-pypi plugin configuration
description: Schema v1 for the publisher-pypi semrel plugin. Configure via SEMREL_* environment variables.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_WORKDIR.description: Working directory containing the Python package to build and publish. Defaults to the current directory.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_PYTHON_BIN.description: Path to the Python interpreter used to build the package. Defaults to "python3" on PATH.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_TWINE_BIN.description: Path to the twine binary used to upload the package. Defaults to "twine" on PATH.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_PYPI_TOKEN.description: PyPI API token used to authenticate the upload.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_PYPI_REPOSITORY_URL.description: Alternate package index URL (e.g. for TestPyPI or a private index). Defaults to the public PyPI index.

SEMREL_VERSION.description: Release version for the current semrel execution. semrel core may expose this as SEMREL_VERSION, SEMREL_TAG_NAME, or SEMREL_NEXT_VERSION depending on phase.

SEMREL_NEXT_VERSION.description: Calculated next release version when SEMREL_VERSION is not yet finalized.

SEMREL_DRY_RUN.description: When true, perform validation and logging only without executing side effects.
